title: trema macrophyllum
intro: Trema macrophyllum, also known as the broad-leaved trema or wide-leaved trema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cannabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trema macrophyllum are numerous, including its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and support digestive health. Trema macrophyllum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
